//: Working state for the current change. Written by /story (and /ship), read by /review and /ship-check so the risk tier and reviewer set are decided ONCE. Safe to delete; commands regenerate it. Not committed with the change unless you want the decision trail in the PR.

adrCatalog.//: ADR catalog discovered by story-implementer, reused by reviewers to avoid re-reading. version = ADR fingerprint (submodule HEAD, else git hash-object of ADR files, else no-adr); reviewers reuse the catalog only when their recomputed fingerprint matches this. Each adrs entry: {id, title, path, applicableTo: [], constraints: {}}
